title: Keysight Introduces Signal Integrity Simulation Software for Hardware Engineers
text: SANTA ROSA, Calif.--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Keysight Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: KEYS), a leading technology company that delivers advanced design and validation solutions to help accelerate innovation to connect and secure the world, introduces the Electrical Performance Scan (EP-Scan), a new high-speed digital simulation tool that supports rapid signal integrity (SI) analysis for hardware engineers and printed circuit board (PCB) designers.

title: Keysight to Spotlight Solutions that Accelerate High-Speed Digital Innovations at DesignCon 2023
Keysight Technologies: A Likely Rock Solid Tech Investment
text: Despite short-term uncertainties, Keysight operates in a future-proof growth market. The company has a rock-solid balance sheet and has been able to consistently increase its profits in recent years.

title: Keysight Technologies Offers Enough Quality Growth To Support A Robust Valuation
text: Keysight management has acknowledged emerging demand "moderation", but the company's leverage to R&D and strong secular growth trends mitigates some of the economic cycle risk. Keysight is tied to strong long-term trends like connectivity, data traffic growth, and electrification, and more specific drivers like 6G wireless, 800G/1.6TB networking, and vehicle electrification.

title: Keysight Enables Aethertek to Validate Performance of 5G Millimeter Wave Open RAN Radio Units
text: SANTA ROSA, Calif.--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Keysight Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: KEYS), a leading technology company that delivers advanced design and validation solutions to help accelerate innovation to connect and secure the world, announced that Aethertek selected the Keysight Open RAN Studio solution to validate the end-to-end performance of its 5G millimeter wave (mmWave) O-RAN Radio Units (O-RU).

title: Keysight and TEVET Collaborate to Provide Real-Time Signal Analysis for Electromagnetic Spectrum Operations
text: SANTA ROSA, Calif.--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Keysight Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: KEYS), a leading technology company that delivers advanced design and validation solutions to help accelerate innovation to connect and secure the world, and TEVET have partnered to address the need for real-time analysis of signals in electromagnetic spectrum operations (EMSO) applications. The gap-less, real-time capability of the collaboration provides the ability to protect and defend operations in the increasingly complex electromagnetic (EM) spectrum environment.

title: Keysight (KEYS) Partners Qualcomm to Boost Rural Broadband
text: Leveraging Keysight's (KEYS) 5G base station and aerospace emulation solutions, the end-to-end 5G NTN connection was tested in Qualcomm's San Diego laboratory.

title: Keysight Coordinates Pan-European 6G Testbed
text: SANTA ROSA, Calif.--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Keysight Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: KEYS), a leading technology company that delivers advanced design and validation solutions to help accelerate innovation to connect and secure the world, announced the company joins forces with sixteen organizations to create 6G-SANDBOX, a pan-European testbed for 6G experimentation and validation of 5G-Advanced and 6G capabilities. As a part of 6G-SANDBOX, Keysight will act as the project coordinator.

title: Keysight, Qualcomm Accelerate 5G Non-Terrestrial Network Communication to Support Broadband in Remote Areas
text: SANTA ROSA, Calif.--( BUSINESS WIRE )--Keysight Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: KEYS), a leading technology company that delivers advanced design and validation solutions to help accelerate innovation to connect and secure the world, announced it has collaborated with Qualcomm Technologies, Inc. to establish an end-to-end 5G non-terrestrial network (NTN) connection. Based on this successful demonstration of call signaling and data transfer using orbit trajectory emulation, Keysight and Qualcomm Technologies aim to accelerate 5G NTN technology to provide affordable broadband connectivity in remote areas.
